message:
Fix runaway CPU usage in budget-exhausted future polling via exponential backoff

The previous implementation used thread::yield_now() when a future
exhausted its poll budget, but yield_now is nearly a no-op on idle
systems, causing a tight spin loop that burned 100% CPU. Replace with
exponential backoff sleep (1ms → 5ms → 25ms) on consecutive budget
exhaustions. The backoff counter intentionally persists across park()
returns since unpark tokens can cause instant wakeups during waker
storms, which would otherwise defeat the backoff.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
